messages.content: I'm gonna give you a couple of MCQ questions and you will choose the right answer from a,b,c or d
As an AI language model, I don't have a personal choice. But I can help you with the questions. Please proceed.

What is the product of the reduction of a carboxylic acid by LiAlH4?
(2 Points)


a)A primary alcohol

b)A secondary alcohol

c)A diol

d)An aldehyde
The correct answer is (a) A primary alcohol.

Aldol condensation takes place in..........................
(2 Points)


a)Aldehyde

b)Ketone

c)Both (a) and (b)

d)None of them
The correct answer is (c) Both (a) and (b).

What is the product of an aldol condensation.....................
(2 Points)


a)An Alkene

b)A Diol

c)Ketone

d)An α,β-unsaturated aldehyde or ketone
The correct answer is (d) An α,β-unsaturated aldehyde or ketone.

What is the product of the reaction between water and pent-3-en-2-one?
(2 Points)


a)3-hydroxypentan-2-one

b)4-hydroxypentan-2-one

c)Pentane-2,4-diol

d)None of them
The correct answer is (a) 3-hydroxypentan-2-one.

Which of the following chemical functions is not a carboxylic acid derivative?
(2 Points)


a)Ether

b)Ester

c)Amide

d)Acyl halide
The correct answer is (a) Ether.

The catalyst used in aldol condensation reaction can be.............................
(2 Points)


acid

alkali

Both (a) and (b)

None of the above
The correct answer is (a) acid.

Which compound is most acidic?
(2 Points)


FCH2CO2H

ClCH2CO2H

BrCH2CO2H

ICH2CO2H
The correct answer is (d) ICH2CO2H.

Which compound is least acidic?
(2 Points)


FCH2CO2H

ClCH2CO2H

BrCH2CO2H

ICH2CO2H
The correct answer is (a) FCH2CO2H.

Which combination of carbonyl compounds gives phenyl vinyl ketone by an aldol condensation?
(2 Points)


Acetophenone and ketone

Acetophenone and aldehyde

Benzaldehyde and aldehyde

Benzaldehyde and ketone
The correct answer is (c) Benzaldehyde and aldehyde.

The products of the reaction of a carboxylic acid and an alcohol would be.....................
  
(2 Points)


Ketone and water

Amide and water

Acid chloride and water

Ester and water
The correct answer is (d) Ester and water.

What is the product of the reaction between water and pent-3-en-2-one?


3-hydroxypentan-2-one

4-hydroxypentan-2-one

Pentane-2,4-diol

None of them
The correct answer is (a) 3-hydroxypentan-2-one.
